MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Attorney, Sammy Obaid of Caltrans Bay Area Legal Division (510-433-9100) appears as counsel for defendant/moving party

No other appearance is made in this matter.

The Court confirms the tentative ruling.

DEFENDANT STATE OF CALIFORNIA by and through the DEPARTMENT OF TRANSPORTATION'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT is GRANTED. No opposition was filed. Written order is signed and filed in open court.

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Deposition Of Afor Mbamwi
Off Calendar Jun-03-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT STATE OF CALIFORNIA'S MOTION TO COMPEL DEPOSITION OF AFOR MBAMWI.

Appearances: Sammy Obaid of the California Department of Transportation (510.433.9100) appearing for defendant and moving party; No other appearances.

The moving party stipulates to the matter being decided by the Judge Pro Tem. As there are no other appearances, any remaining parties to the motion are deemed to have stipulated to the Judge Pro Tem deciding this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: The unopposed Motion to Compel Deposition of Afor Mbamwi is GRANTED. Ms. Mbamwi is ordered to submit for deposition on a mutually agreeable date within 20 days after notice of entry of this order. Prevailing party to submit a proposed form of order. Judge Pro Tem: Margaret Niver, Clerk: E. Larnauti, Not Reported
